content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Book is 79% deployed with 10 CNC positions and all SLs at zero — urgent need to set proper risk controls on every position. Market showing sector rotation into defensives (FMCG, pharma) and power theme continuing to extend. VIX at 18.83 elevated. With deployment at max and net unrealized negative, priority is risk management (setting SLs and trailing gains), NOT new entries.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "new_target": 88.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "PSU bank rally intact with strong Q4 results (business +18% YoY). Stock at 52-week high with bullish MACD. Setting SL at 74 (below recent support at 71.65 pivot, ~6% below entry) to give room but cap loss. Target 88 based on momentum continuation. R:R ~1.4:1 — acceptable given momentum and sector strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "new_target": 1080.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Strong earnings beat drove +10% gap. Trail SL to 955 — slightly below yesterday's close (907) would be too loose; 955 protects most of the gain while allowing breathing room. Target 1080 gives clean R:R vs 52w high at 1141. Best position in book."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "new_target": 135.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Gold softening post-Akshaya Tritiya but safe-haven thesis intact with geopolitical tensions. Supertrend SELL is a concern. Setting SL at 120.50 (~3.7% below entry) — if broken, thesis is compromised. Target 135 on next geopolitical flare-up or USD weakness."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "new_target": 1820.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Power sector leadership intact. Stock at fresh 52w high with +5.8% move. Trail SL to 1620 (near breakeven, below today's pivot 1552 would be too loose given extension). Target 1820 approaches analyst consensus floor. Q4 results May 13 is catalyst but also event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Blockbuster Q4 (+27% PAT, +22.6% rev), fresh 52w high, defensive FMCG leadership. SL at 1355 (~4% below entry) below today's low 1382 leaves room for volatility. Target 1500 ~6% upside, consistent with ICICI Sec TP Rs 1650."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Banking sector leader, Q4 results April 27 (3 trading days away) — key catalyst. Strong provisional numbers (deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%). SL at 1005 (~4.2% below entry) below today's low 1035. Target 1130 on earnings momentum. Time-boxed to exit post-results regardless."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "new_target": 735.00,
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 29 is catalyst. Clean FDA inspection (procedural only). 3.7x volume surge suggests institutional accumulation. SL at 650 (~4.6% below entry) below 20-DMA 625. Target 735 on earnings + approach to 52w high. Time-boxed to results."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "new_target": 2510.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 28 — key event risk. FMCG defensive rotation theme alive but HUL Q3 UVG only +4% is weak vs Nestle. SL at 2270 (~4.3% below entry). Target 2510 — conservative given event risk. Exit post-results regardless."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "new_target": 430.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power play with regulated returns, at 52w high. Strong brokerage consensus. SL at 388 (~4% below entry) below pivot support. Target 430 — modest given defensive name. Q4 results May 15."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "new_target": 235.00,
      "confidence": 0.58,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "Stock up 76% YoY, shooting star on April 20 is bearish reversal signal. Q4 earnings call April 29 is major event risk. Power cluster already over-represented in book (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER). SL at 202 (tight, ~5.6% below entry) below today's low 212.53 gives some room but protects from post-earnings gap. Target 235. Exit pre-earnings if possible."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 74.00,
      "reasoning": "Thesis intact — PSU bank rally + Q4 strength. SL set."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 955.00,
      "reasoning": "Best-performing position. Trail SL to lock in most of the gain post-earnings gap."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 120.50,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge — keep with tight SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1620.00,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high — trail SL near breakeven to protect gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1355.00,
      "reasoning": "Post-earnings momentum, SL below today's low."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1005.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 results April 27 — binary event, time-boxed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 650.00,
      "reasoning": "Volume surge suggests pre-earnings accumulation. Exit post-results April 29."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2270.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 April 28 — will reassess post-results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 388.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive power, long-dated thesis."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 202.00,
      "reasoning": "Stretched after 76% YoY run; shooting star + Q4 event risk April 29. Tight SL, may exit pre-earnings."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "PIRAMALFIN, DEEPAKNTR, ELECON — already gapped up massively, chasing extension is poor R:R. AUROPHARMA buyback floor is interesting but skipping given portfolio is at 79% deployment. IEX — regulatory risk from market coupling draft is existential; volume surge likely distribution. Avoid. CESC, BHEL, TRITURBINE, WHIRLPOOL — not adding further power/capex exposure given cluster concentration. Monitor AUBANK and GRANULES for post-earnings follow-through.",
  "portfolio_notes": "CRITICAL: Portfolio is 79% deployed at max capacity with ZERO stop-losses set on any position — this decision cycle's primary value-add is setting SLs on all 10 positions. Power cluster (TORNTPOWER + NTPC + ADANIPOWER) already ~24% of capital — NO additional power names. Financial cluster (MAHABANK + PNBHOUSING + AUBANK) ~30% — near limits. Defensive FMCG/Pharma (NESTLEIND + HINDUNILVR + GRANULES) + GOLDBEES provides balance. Heavy earnings event risk cluster in next week: AUBANK Apr 27, HUL Apr 28, GRANULES Apr 29, ADANIPOWER Apr 29. No new entries this cycle — deployment hysteresis applies. Next cycle's priority: trim on pre-earnings strength to free capital, reassess post-results."
}
